quick_skim.title: DuplexOmni: Real-Time Listening, Seeing, Thinking, and Speaking for Full-Duplex Interaction
quick_skim.abstract: Human interaction is continuous, multimodal, and full-duplex by nature. Although recent omni models have made substantial progress in unified speech, vision, and text modeling, combining seamless real-time interaction with complex reasoning and tool use remains challenging. We present DuplexOmni, a method for real-time multimodal full-duplex interaction. DuplexOmni separates model capability into an interaction layer and a thinking layer, which collaborate asynchronously in parallel. The interaction layer is implemented by the DuplexOmni model, an end-to-end system that processes streaming audio and video inputs while generating text and speech responses in real time. The thinking layer is a pluggable module that provides complex reasoning and tool-use capabilities. To support this method, we further develop a Writer-Director pipeline for constructing continuous-interaction training data. Experiments show that DuplexOmni achieves strong performance on multiple public benchmarks and exhibits natural full-duplex interaction ability.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: real-time multimodal full-duplex interaction, processes video and audio for speaking, relevant to digital human avatar creation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 实时多模态全双工交互，处理视频和音频以生成语音，与数字人虚拟人创建相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 实时多模态全双工交互，处理视频和音频以生成语音，与数字人虚拟人创建相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 实时多模态全双工交互，处理视频和音频以生成语音，与数字人虚拟人创建相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: DuplexOmni enables real-time full-duplex multimodal interaction with separate interaction and thinking layers, processing streaming video and audio to generate speech responses.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出DuplexOmni，一种用于实时多模态全双工交互的方法。它将模型分为交互层和思考层，异步并行协作：交互层端到端处理流式音视频输入并实时生成文本和语音回复，思考层提供复杂推理。该系统可直接用于数字人虚拟人的实时对话交互，实现听、看、想、说一体化，是创建生动数字人的关键组件。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文提出DuplexOmni，一种用于实时多模态全双工交互的方法。它将模型分为交互层和思考层，异步并行协作：交互层端到端处理流式音视频输入并实时生成文本和语音回复，思考层提供复杂推理。该系统可直接用于数字人虚拟人的实时对话交互，实现听、看、想、说一体化，是创建生动数字人的关键组件。
